description: Wasm-GC inline array allocation integer overflow - MacroAssembler::wasmArrayAllocCheckLength used a signed-overflow test for numElements * elementSize, allowing unsigned-overflowing lengths to enter the fast allocation path. The vulnerable fast-path check in js/src/jit/MacroAssembler.cpp interacted with wasm array sizing limits declared in js/src/wasm/WasmGcObject.h. A wrapped byte count under-allocated the backing store while the object retained the attacker-controlled logical length, enabling out-of-bounds array access. The fix compares against the correct per-element maximum length instead of relying on signed overflow flags.

fixes.description: Bug 1882751: Replace runtime array length checks with a
